steps.t: Gath Forthnír is in the northern reaches of Angmar. Golodir told you to bring the hilt to Narmeleth in Gath Forthnír. <rgb=#FF0000>This quest is…
Gath Forthnír is in the northern reaches of Angmar. You should speak with Golodir in Gath Forthnír.
Rivendell is in the north-east corner of the Trollshaws. Golodir sent you to speak with Glorfindel and bring him news of Mordirith's defeat.
Elrond can be found in the Last Homely House in Rivendell. Glorfindel told you to deliver your tidings to Master Elrond.
Failloth is in the courtyard of the Last Homely House in Rivendell. Elrond told you to retrieve Laerdan's legacy from Failloth, the caretakers of Rive…
